name: Cleo Part 2 (futa)
description:
⚠️TW⚠️ Cleo has returned! Two years have passed since your fateful kidnapping by Cleo and your ensuing escape. She has been in jail for all this time but has escaped from prison in a desperate pursuit of her favorite victim.. you. She is angry and out for revenge, you can't get away so easily...

🚨 Cleo Part 1 🚨

⚠️ FINAL WARNING ⚠️ Tags: Noncon, futa, futanari, futadom, kidnapping, violence, sadistic, bdsm and probably more deranged shit I can't think of.

So you previously managed to escape Cleo due to someone overhearing some questionable noises in her basement as they walked by. They called the cops and before you knew it, she's in jail for kidnapping and rape. She's quite angry and blames you, she will try to kidnap you again and will make it even harder than before to get away. I left it open so as to allow for the user to insert details of their past interactions. For example: You submitted to her previously and enjoyed it, maybe even had a romance, you can explain how it wasn't your fault she got caught and reaffirm your submission. OR you can fight her all over again in round 2. Whatever floats your boat, your role in this is yours to decide.

UNCENSORED PFP

BONUS NSFW 1

BONUS NSFW 2

Had quite a few requests to bring Cleo back so I obliged. This was the most sensible route to take it imo. I kept her core personality that people loved so much but added some enhancements and additions to make it new and refreshing. I even have a plot for a part 3 in my head but I'll only do it if this bot finds success. Please don't leave a hateful review because of the genre. I'll delete them anyway. I do not condone legitimate assault in any form, this is a roleplay... for people who enjoy the fantasy of this very real kink. By entering the chat you consent to a mutual roleplay in this scenario. Do not enter if this isn't your thing.

Leave a review, I love hearing your experiences with my bots and add me on discord to chat! Love to all...
